title: Poova Eduthu Oru Maala Lyrics Amman Kovil Kizhakale
stanzas: <div>Poova Eduthu Oru Maala Lyrics Amman Kovil Kizhakale

Poova eduthu oru
maala thoduthu vachcheney
en chinna rasa. (2)

un tholukkaagathaan
indha maala yaengudhu.
kalyaanam kachcheri
eppodhu.

Poova eduthu oru
maala thoduthu vachcheney
en chinna rasa. (2)

un tholukkaagathaan
indha maala yaengudhu.
kalyaanam kachcheri
eppodhu.

Poova eduthu oru
maala thoduthu vachcheney
en chinna rasa. (2)

kaathula soodam pola
karaiyiren unnaala. (2)
kannaadi vala
munnaadi vizha
en dhegam melinjaachu

kalyaana varam
unnaala perum
nannaala nenachaachu.

chinna vayasu pulla
kanni manasukulla
vanna kanavu vandhathe.

kalyaanam kachcheri
eppodhu, unakku. ..

Poova eduthu oru
maala thoduthu vachcheney
en chinna rasa. (2)

un tholukkaagathaan
indha maala yaengudhu.
kalyaanam kachcheri
eppodhu.

Poova eduthu oru
maala thoduthu vachcheney
en chinna rasa.

vaadaiyaa veesum kaathu
valaikkudhe ena paathu
vaangalen neram paaththu
vandhu enna kaappaathu.

kuththaala mazha
enmela vizha
appodhu soodaachu.

eppodhum ena
koththaaga ana
en dhegam yaedaachu.

manja kulikkaiyila
nenju viriyuthunga.
konjam anaichu kollaiyaa

kalyaanam kachcheri
eppodhu, unakku. ..

Poova eduthu oru
maala thoduthu vachcheney
en chinna rasa. (2)

un tholukkaagathaan
indha maala yaengudhu.
kalyaanam kachcheri
eppodhu.

Poova eduthu oru
maala thoduthu vachcheney
en chinna rasa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the joy and beauty of love, symbolized through the imagery of a garland made of flowers.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Amman Kovil Kizhakale, the song is featured during a romantic moment, highlighting the characters' affection for each other.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by renowned artists P. Jayachandran and S. Janaki.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Poova Eduthu Oru Maala was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on April 24, 1986.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poova Eduthu Oru Maala, the lyrical beauty and melodic charm come together to create a heartfelt expression of love. The song plays a pivotal role in Amman Kovil Kizhakale, encapsulating the emotions of the characters as they celebrate their bond. With its soothing melody and romantic lyrics, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and joy. This classic track remains a favorite for weddings and anniversaries, resonating with anyone who cherishes love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poova Eduthu Oru Maala from Amman Kovil Kizhakale is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and celebration. With the enchanting voices of P. Jayachandran and S. Janaki, this song evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of Ilaiyaraaja's composition that makes this track a cherished classic.
stanzaMeanings: I have taken a flower and made a garland for my little love.
Where is this garland for you? When will the wedding ceremony happen?
I have taken a flower and made a garland for my little love.
Where is this garland for you? When will the wedding ceremony happen?
I have taken a flower and made a garland for my little love.
Like a flame in the wind, I am burning for you. My reflection has changed in the mirror.
With your blessings, I have thought of great things for the wedding.
In the hearts of young girls, dreams have come true at a young age.
When will the wedding ceremony happen, for you?
I have taken a flower and made a garland for my little love.
Where is this garland for you? When will the wedding ceremony happen?
I have taken a flower and made a garland for my little love.
I have watched the wind blowing and thought about how to protect myself.
When it rains with joy, it pours down on me.
Always, I feel a longing, but my body has changed.
In the warmth of the sun, the heart blooms. Just a little bit, let it be.
When will the wedding ceremony happen, for you?
I have taken a flower and made a garland for my little love.
Where is this garland for you? When will the wedding ceremony happen?
I have taken a flower and made a garland for my little love.
